creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
(In reply to Joseph Mingrone from comment #5)

Some are trickly because I have seen these already in others to be transitive from a direct dependency from libtool or a config script. If the direct dep is now full of OPTIONs you cannot reasonably add those transitive ones to LIB_DEPENDS. I will give it a spin anyway next week.
